entities.name: arch-costrates
observations: CostRates Excel workbook (56 sheets) is the system source of truth for ALL configuration — cost rates, approval chains, form config, dropdown values, OP parsing keywords
File: MRMSRates_YYYY.xlsx in CostRates SharePoint document library
Selection: TypeofFile=CostRates AND EffectiveFromDate <= today <= ValidTillDate
Only MRMS Owners group may upload new versions
Annual update required: Salary scales, Travel rates, DSA rates, Exchange rates, OS values, RE values
